content:
O dabi pe ibeere rẹ n tọka si awọn abuda ti opo iṣowo kan, pẹlu iwuwo omi rẹ ni centipoise ati iye owo-wiwọle (Reynolds number) ti o yipada lati lamina si turbulent. Sibẹsibẹ, awọn alaye wọnyi jẹ ti imọ-jinlẹ ti imọ-ẹrọ ṣiṣan omi (fluid dynamics), kii ṣe ti opo iṣowo.

- **Iwuwo omi ni centipoise** jẹ iwọn ti viscosity ti omi tabi omiiran ti nṣàn. Fun omi mimọ ni iwọn otutu yara, viscosity jẹ nipa 1 centipoise (cP).
- **Iye owo-wiwọle (Reynolds number)** ni iye ti o pinnu iru ṣiṣan naa: lamina (Re < 2000), turbulent (Re > 4000), ati agbegbe gbigbe laarin wọn.

Ti o ba n
